Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Average time for Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Total time between Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER across all rework loops
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Minimum time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER in variants containing at least one rejection loop
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER after the execution of Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER in cases that eventually reach Payment Handled
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Time from Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER to the next occurrence of Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time between Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Minimum time for Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER in variants where the pre-approver is the only approver before supervisor
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER and the end of the case

Name: Total time from Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER in repeated approval-rejection cycles
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER in variants that do not involve ADMINISTRATION or BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Average waiting time to the Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER after Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Time of Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER in cases originating from domestic declarations versus pre-paid travel costs
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER and the end of the case

Name: Average time it takes Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER compared to the time it takes Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION in similar process paths
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER and the end of the case

Name: Total time from Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER to final Payment Handled in successfully completed cases
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Minimum time between Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER and the subsequent Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER in re-submitted cases
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Cycle Time of Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER measured from the moment the case enters the pre-approver’s queue until rejection is recorded
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Average time from Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER to Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE in variants with exactly one rejection loop
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Total time for Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER in 2017 versus 2018 data, considering departmental scope differences
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER and the end of the case

Name: Time from the first Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to the first Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER in multi-rejection variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'
